name: Michail Rimikis
summary: Highly motivated Business Administration student at La Salle University Barcelona, specialising in Digital Marketing, with a current GPA of 8.25/10. Known for approaching challenges with enthusiasm and integrity, I bring hands-on experience in retail sales, customer service, and administrative support across international environments. I am passionate about my professional development and consistently strive to deliver high-quality results, looking to contribute my energy and dedication to a forward-thinking team.

experience.description: Managed daily store operations including inventory management and visual merchandising to maximise sales potential. Exceeded sales targets through proactive customer engagement and effective cross-selling techniques in a high-volume retail environment.

Delivered exceptional customer service in a fast-paced hospitality environment. Collaborated with kitchen and bar staff to coordinate orders and resolve customer inquiries, contributing to overall team efficiency and guest satisfaction.

Facilitated the transition of the event from a national to an international platform, handling complex administrative workflows. Supervised robotics course simulations, demonstrating leadership by overseeing technical protocols and mentoring competitive teams.
